openIssues.title: self-bootstrap happy path child issue
openIssues.body:
## 用户故事

作为 agent-loop 维护者，我希望 happy path child issue 可以直接进入 claimable 队列。

## Context

### Dependencies
```json
{"dependsOn":[]}
```

### AllowedFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.ts

### ForbiddenFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/daemon.ts

### MustPreserve
- scenario stays deterministic

### OutOfScope
- real GitHub calls

### RequiredSemantics
- issue remains claimable in replay

### ReviewHints
- check contract validity

### Validation
- `bun test apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.test.ts`

## RED 测试

```ts
throw new Error('self-bootstrap happy path fixture')
```

## 实现步骤
1. add replay fixture

## 验收
- [ ] replay case stays claimable
